findings: _calendar_navigate(delta) shifts by day in day/agenda mode and by week in week mode; month wrap handled by timedelta arithmetic.
_calendar_date_label formats 'Today · Mon, Apr 10, 2026' when viewing today; visual distinction via 'Today' prefix.
_cycle_calendar_view toggles day/week/agenda via v key; active mode indicator rendered in status bar (📅 Day / 📆 Week / 📋 Agenda).
Week view computes Monday from weekday() and fetches via calendar_events_range (single call, not 7).
Agenda view shows 14-day forward window with day separators; today row highlighted in bold cyan with ● prefix.
Multiday all_day events: rendering walks events with all_day=True and appends them to each day spanned (estart < d < eend).
_enter_edit_event puts compose input into edit mode; _do_update_event calls client.update_event with field kwargs; Esc cancels via _editing_event = None.
Attendees rendered in detail pane with status icons ✅/❌/❓/⏳ (accepted/declined/tentative/needsAction).
